title: Non-Executive Member re-appointed to the HIAL Board  – Highlands and Islands Airports Limited

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Minister for Agriculture and Connectivity, Jim Fairlie MSP, has announced the re-appointment of Isabel Todenhoefer as a Non-Executive Director of the Highlands and Islands Airports Ltd Board.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: The reappointment is for two years and runs from 1 March 2026 to 29 February 2028. Chris Holliday, Chair of the HIAL Board said, "I am delighted that Isabel has been re-appointed to the HIAL Board. She brings considerable experience and skills in the field of finance and the aviation industry, which is key to our work to deliver a safe and sustainable airport operating model to meet the needs of our customers, communities and colleagues. Having worked closely with Isabel as a fellow Non-Executive Director, I particularly look forward to continuing that relationship in my new role as Chair."

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: You can read the full announcement on the Scottish Government website . Non-Executive Member re-appointed to the HIAL Board – Highlands and Islands Airports Limited
